ref: He taught them like someone with authority, and not like their teachers of the Law of Moses.
text: Wǝ asatete ményifo fe kase afi eto bateasa laate. Bomu óte asa fe nwǝ nkpe ǝsuǝale lǝ asa nnya óte ǝsuǝ.
translated: They are going to the forest to cut sticks to build a house. The men will cut the sticks and the women will carry them on their heads.

ref: When people mistreat you in one town, hurry to another one. I promise you before you have gone to all the towns of Israel, the Son of Man will come.
text: Lǝ bati mi kama lǝ umǝ ɔnii, bitsyetsyi bisu umǝ bamba. Nya nlɛ mi bɔtɛyi sitinti minkǝ, biembuyifo mi keyifo belosǝ lǝ Israel eto kǝmǝ ka kenke fɛ mɔ, Utidi Eto Ubi luubǝ.
translated: They said I am like the son of a king, that is why they are doing this to me. But I know I am a poor person, they are trying to make me a scapegoat like the people of Israel did to that man, Jesus Christ.

ref: You know our ancestors were told, “Don't use the Lord's name to make a promise unless you are going to keep it.”
text: “Kɔɔ bɛnɔ tsya bátɛyi betidi bǝnkǝ, ‘Mankpadi asa esi etudi kɛnyɛ lǝ nnya ǝsuǝ. Bomu yifo lǝ ntamu bo faka fǝtǝ Bonamute ǝsuǝ.’
translated: The elder said to the children, 'The hunter's wife is not allowed to eat the meat of the Bonamute animal. If she does, her husband will not catch any more Bonamute.'

ref: A woman who had been bleeding for twelve years came up behind Jesus and barely touched his clothes.
text: Se ɔntɔɔ, usionko utsyuǝ wǝ kɔtɔ díkakpo lǝ lefosi alɛ ǝnuǝ sɔ̃ɔ̃ ǝsuǝ tsya ǝtǝkǝko Yesu kama nya útidi wǝ awu eto kotosi.
translated: When he came, he did not find him, but he found the disciples sleeping and said to them, "Why are you sleeping, get up, let us go, the betrayer of Jesus is near, the hour has come, let us go to the cross."

ref: Everyone who has something will be given more, and they will have more than enough. But everything will be taken from those who don't have anything.
text: Itsyise utidi wǝ nkpe asaa, wǝ ke bonsi boofi ditsyuǝ bakpe bawunsǝ nɛ. Nya utidi wǝ kulesa lentee, sɛkɛɛ nte wǝ tsyaa, bɔɔlɛ ni bafo wǝ lǝ ani.
translated: The farmer went to the forest, he cut down trees to make a farm but the trees were too many for him. The farmer went to the village elder, he explained to him, the elder said he should call his friends to help him.
